title: calibrachoa spathulata
intro: Calibrachoa spathulata, also known as the yellow bugler or Mexican sunflower, is a species of flowering plant in the evening primrose family. This plant is used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Calibrachoa spathulata include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate cold symptoms, and promote digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or tincture to be used as a natural remedy for its medicinal properties.
